name: clawtext-ingest
title: ClawText Ingest — Multi-Source Memory Ingestion with Discord Support
description: Production-ready data ingestion for OpenClaw agents. Convert Discord forums, files, URLs, JSON, and raw text into structured memory with automatic YAML headers, SHA1 deduplication, and ClawText cluster integration. CLI + Node.js API + 6 agent patterns.
subtitle: Autonomous multi-source ingestion for AI agent memory systems
author: ragesaq
tagline: From Discord to Memory in One Command
features: 🎯 **Discord Integration** — Direct forum/channel/thread ingestion with hierarchy preservation
📁 **Multi-Source** — Files (glob), URLs, JSON, raw text, Discord exports
⚡ **Auto-Batch Mode** — Intelligent mode selection (<500: full, ≥500: streaming)
📊 **Real-Time Progress** — Live progress bars for large ingestions
🛠️ **Dual Interface** — CLI for humans, Node.js API + 6 patterns for agents
📝 **YAML Frontmatter** — Automatic metadata (date, project, type, entities)
🔗 **ClawText Integration** — Seamless cluster indexing and RAG injection
⚙️ **Flexible Control** — Configurable batch size, concurrency, content filtering
problems_solved: Getting Discord knowledge into agent memory
Avoiding duplicate ingestion across multiple runs
Integrating knowledge into RAG/context injection systems
Autonomous agent workflows for data ingestion
use_cases: Ingest Discord forums into agent memory (team decisions, FAQs)
Populate memory with documentation (files, URLs, exports)
Build knowledge bases from chat histories (Slack, Discord exports)
Scheduled daily memory syncs (via cron jobs)
Autonomous agent workflows with memory population
target_audience: Teams using Discord as knowledge base

comparison.vs_manual_ingestion: Automates data import, prevents duplicates, structures metadata
comparison.vs_api_export_tools: Integrated with ClawText RAG, supports 5+ source types, dedup built-in

quick_start.discord: clawtext-ingest-discord describe-forum --forum-id ID && clawtext-ingest-discord fetch-discord --forum-id ID

usage.nodejs_api: import { ClawTextIngest } from 'clawtext-ingest'; const ingest = new ClawTextIngest(); await ingest.fromFiles(['*.md'], { project: 'docs' });
usage.nodejs_discord: import { DiscordIngestionRunner } from 'clawtext-ingest/src/agent-runner.js'; const runner = new DiscordIngestionRunner(ingest); await runner.ingestForumAutonomous({ forumId, token });
usage.agent_patterns: See AGENT_GUIDE.md for 6 autonomous patterns (Direct API, Discord Agent, CLI, Cron, Batch, Thread)

examples.title: Fetch Discord Forum
examples.description: Inspect and ingest an entire Discord forum with progress tracking

examples.title: Autonomous Agent Pattern
examples.code: const runner = new DiscordIngestionRunner(ingest); await runner.ingestForumAutonomous({ forumId, token });
examples.description: Agent-native pattern for autonomous Discord ingestion

examples.title: Multi-Source Batch
examples.code: await ingest.ingestAll([{ type: 'files', data: [...] }, { type: 'json', data: [...] }]);
examples.description: Unified ingestion from multiple sources with one call

examples.title: Scheduled Daily Sync
examples.description: Recurring agent task for daily memory synchronization

companion_tools.clawtext: RAG layer for automatic memory context injection on every prompt

clawtext.description: ClawText automatically indexes ingested memories and injects relevant context into agent prompts
clawtext.workflow: Ingest → Rebuild Clusters → RAG Injection → Enhanced Agent Responses

discord.features: Forum hierarchy preservation, real-time progress, auto-batch mode

roadmap.planned: Multi-source streaming, database backends, advanced filtering

testimonials: "Essential for building knowledge-aware AI agents." — OpenClaw Community
"Zero duplicate issues, handles massive datasets efficiently." — RAG System Developers
